Container.Name: HearthShelf

Branch.TagDescription: Latest development build from the main branch.

Container.Overview:
HearthShelf is a browser-first replacement UI for AudiobookShelf. This is the slim image: it serves the HearthShelf web app and points at your EXISTING AudiobookShelf server. You must already run AudiobookShelf somewhere - set ABS Server URL to its address. If you do not have AudiobookShelf yet, use the HearthShelf-AIO template instead, which bundles it.
The QuestGiver AI recommender is optional. Leave the AI Provider blank to disable the AI path (the built-in heuristic recommender still works).
Container.Description: HearthShelf slim - the web UI for your existing AudiobookShelf server.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the HearthShelf web UI.

Config.Name: HearthShelf Data
Config.Description: HearthShelf-specific state: app settings sync, QuestGiver config and history, Discover feedback (embedded SQLite). Does NOT duplicate any AudiobookShelf data.

Config.Name: ABS Server URL
Config.Description: REQUIRED. Address of your existing AudiobookShelf server, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:13378 . HearthShelf is the only host users touch; it reverse-proxies this internally.

Config.Name: Public URL
Config.Description: Optional. The public URL users reach HearthShelf at (used for OIDC redirects and links). Leave blank if you only access it on your LAN. Set to your reverse-proxy hostname for external access, e.g. https://books.example.com .

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. QuestGiver AI recommender. Leave blank to disable the AI path (the heuristic recommender still works). e.g. anthropic, openai.

Config.Name: AI Model
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Model id for the AI provider above.

Config.Name: AI API Key
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. API key for the AI provider. Held server-side, never sent to the browser.

Config.Name: AI Base URL
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Override the AI provider base URL (for self-hosted/compatible endpoints).

Config.Name: AI Rate Limit
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Per-user monthly QuestGiver request cap, or 'off' for unlimited.

Config.Name: QuestGiver Enabled
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Enable the QuestGiver guided AI matchmaker surface.

Config.Name: Discover Enabled
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Enable the ambient Discover history shelves.

Config.Name: ReadMeABook URL
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. ReadMeABook acquisition backend URL. Leave blank to hide the Requests UI.

Config.Name: ReadMeABook Token
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Auth token for the ReadMeABook backend.

Config.Name: ABS Config (read-only, for leaderboard)
Config.Description: Read-only mount of your AudiobookShelf config folder (the one holding absdatabase.sqlite). Powers the cross-user leaderboard and 'finished by N people' counts. Mounted read-only - HearthShelf never writes to ABS's database. Clear this and the ABS Database Path below to disable the leaderboard.

Config.Name: ABS Database Path (leaderboard)
Config.Description: Path INSIDE this container to AudiobookShelf's absdatabase.sqlite. Should match the read-only ABS Config mount above (default points at it). Leave blank to disable the leaderboard.
